name: True Clubs
about: True Clubs is a full-service golf resource specializing in custom club fitting and instruction. Founded in 2013, the venue has been recognized by Golf Digest as one of the Top 100 Clubfitting facilities in the country. It operates as an indoor facility designed to eliminate environmental variables, providing accurate data for club fitting and swing analysis. The establishment emphasizes a science-backed approach, utilizing advanced technology to fit players with properly customized equipment and provide expert instruction to improve their golf game.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional club fitting with Trackman 4 technology
TPI Certified instruction for all skill levels
Ability to mix and match any brand's head with any shaft
No sales pressure environment focused purely on performance improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor for all fittings and lessons, measuring technical data including club path and launch angles

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your current clubs for fitting purposes, but True Clubs provides the technology and equipment to fit you with new clubs that match your swing perfectly. They can build any driver/iron shaft with any head to your specifications.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the facility, and no information about a BYOB policy is provided in the content.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The content does not provide information on simulator golf rounds or typical playing times. However, it does mention that simulator golf rounds cost $60 per round per player.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The content does not specifically address child-friendly features, services, or policies. The venue specializes in serious club fitting and instruction, but does not explicitly prohibit children.
